{{Infobox character
| name = Neth’terith
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|impale continents with his massive horns}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|one of the Seven Calamities, Shadow Claw}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Seven Calamities of the D’Niss}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Neth’terith, also known as the [[Shadow]] Claw, is a massive, beetle-like entity and one of the [[Seven Calamities]] belonging to the [[D’Niss]]. Described as being the size of a moon, this creature possesses black plating and enormous horns capable of piercing entire continents. In combat, Neth’terith can deploy wings from its shell and commands a swarm of fly-like parasites and beetle-sized brood that function as fighter ships. Despite its monstrous appearance, the entity is highly intelligent and capable of utilizing psychic impulses. During a major confrontation on a green world, Neth’terith faced opposition from the planet's [[World Spirit]] and five [[Divine Titans]]. The creature was eventually subjected to a magical cloud designed to disrupt its psychic abilities and allow parasites to find vulnerabilities in its shell. Ultimately, Neth’terith was left behind by the [[D’Niss]] as a sacrificial gesture before they departed the universe, resulting in its broken and leaking remains.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|As one of the [[Seven Calamities]] of the [[D’Niss]], Neth’terith is a massive beetle known as the [[Shadow]] Claw. This black-shelled entity attacks the planet, utilizing its enormous horns to impale entire continents. Though it appeared as a moon-sized insect, the creature was eventually slain, leaving behind a form that resembled a leaking and cracked moon.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Neth’terith]] is one of the [[Seven Calamities]] and appears as a moon-sized beetle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Neth’terith]] is a slain monster that resembled a cracked and leaking moon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Neth’terith]] is one of the [[Seven Calamities]] of the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Neth’terith]] is known as the [[Shadow]] Claw and is one of the [[Seven Calamities]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Neth’terith]] looks like a black-shelled beetle and can impale continents with his massive horns.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Neth’terith]] is a giant beetle that attacks the planet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
